  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
